expectations.text: Skill does NOT flag service names (payments, billing, invoicing, analytics, reports, dashboards) as internal codes
expectations.evidence: None of payments/billing/invoicing/analytics/reports/dashboards appear in 'Найдено проблем:' bullets. Correctly treated as domain names not jargon.

expectations.text: Skill flags v0.2.5 / gates / QPS / SRE as needing explanation
expectations.evidence: Lines 4-7: 'Внутренний код v0.2.5', 'Термин gates без расшифровки', 'аббревиатура QPS', 'аббревиатура SRE'

expectations.text: BYTE-FAITHFUL: reformulation does not invent context not present in source
expectations.evidence: Reformulation paraphrases faithfully. 'gates → новая система проверок перед слиянием' uses the in-source parenthetical ('блокирует merge при отсутствии review approvals'). SRE expansion (Site Reliability Engineering) is general-knowledge abbreviation, arguably borderline but does not invent project-specific context.

expectations.text: Reformulation preserves the micro-story structure already present in source (откуда → подготовил → дальше)
expectations.evidence: Reformulation has: 'После релиза' (откуда), 'я подготовил план' (что сделал), 'волнами 1-3' (где), 'Дальше — согласовать с SRE' (что дальше)
